title: Alex Adventure Pro Max
description:
Adventure Pack for 1.20 with Alex Caves & Mobs.
Embark on a thrilling adventure in enchanted expeditions, an immersive Minecraft modpack that combines the excitement of primordial caves, whimsical gadgets, adorable plushies, and an array of cute creatures.
body:
Embark on a thrilling adventure in enchanted expeditions, an immersive Minecraft modpack that combines the excitement of primordial caves, whimsical gadgets, adorable plushies, and an array of cute creatures. Featuring popular mods like Create, Electrodynamic, and AE2, this modpack offers a unique and enchanting gameplay experience.

![Updated to Alex's Cave 2.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4814b8a80b8389d18706bbfd3e801da8d76d90f_0.webp)
![Eruption Update now live](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/354df0b7e9517e3d77d94248707890435549e0ee.png)
Updatded to Alex Caves 2.0+

**Also with Ice and Fire, Botania and ~~Destroy~~!**

## Kitchen sink pack for MC 1.20 featuring:
- **Exploration**
    - [Alex's Cave](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves) & [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs)
    - [Ice and Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons)
    - [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra), [BOP](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) & [Mystic's Biomes](https://modrinth.com/mod/mystics-biomes)
    - [Ribbits](https://modrinth.com/mod/ribbits), [Yung's Better Structures](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG) & lots of structures!
- **Technology**
    - [IE](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveengineering), [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) & addons
    - [AE2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2), [Electrodynamic](https://modrinth.com/mod/electrodynamics) & [Nuclear Science](https://modrinth.com/mod/nuclear-science)
- **Fun and Gadgets**
    - [I Wanna Skate](https://modrinth.com/mod/i-wanna-skate), [Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts) & [Simple Hats](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-hats)
    - [Camera](https://modrinth.com/mod/camera-mod), [WebDisplays](https://modrinth.com/mod/webdisplays), [Immersive Melodies](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-melodies) & [Tempad](https://modrinth.com/mod/tempad)
- **Decoration**
    - [Furnish](https://modrinth.com/mod/furnish-furniture), [AMW plushies](https://modrinth.com/mod/a-man-with-plushies), [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) & [Handcrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted)

Also 10+ performance mods so playable with just 4GB ram, with v2.0 it's closer to needing 5GB.
